assertions.title: Config resolution is consistent across CLI and API-backed flows

steps.observed: Returns real course data using config.json credentials
Both CLI and API use same config.json for baseUrl and credentials

evidence.terminalOutput: CLI successfully retrieves courses using config

assertions.notes: Config resolution is consistent across surfaces

assertions.title: CLI range selection and API job ranges refer to the same lecture slice

steps.observed: server.go line 765-767: Reverse lectures to match CLI behavior
server.go line 796 implements same reversal logic

assertions.notes: API selectJobLectures explicitly aligns with CLI selectLectureRange by reversing lectures first

assertions.title: View and audio options normalize consistently across config, CLI, API, and downloader

steps.observed: cli.go line 434 calls normalizeViews, line 564 normalizes config
server.go line 838 maps views for downloader
cli.go line 687-691 uses normalized views for chunk counting

assertions.title: End-to-end download flow produces observable outputs without interactive fallback

steps.observed: Command returns immediately with structured response

assertions.notes: Download in JSON mode returns structured responses without prompts

assertions.title: CLI JSON and API response contracts are both machine-consumable together

evidence.terminalOutput: Both surfaces have stable, documented response structures

assertions.notes: Response shapes are intentionally mixed and documented

assertions.title: Secrets do not leak in agent-facing outputs during failure paths

evidence.terminalOutput: No secrets leaked in tested failure paths

assertions.notes: Secrets are not exposed in CLI output, API errors, or logs

summary: Tested 6 assertions: all passed. Config, ranges, views, E2E flow, and secrets handling work correctly.
